rows: The history of Catarina has been told and re-told, twisted and become legend. But the history of Rina starts where it ends. It is no small wonder that she drew the attention of Dominic De Guzman and his brood, drawn in part at the request of his newest childe, Beatrice d'Esta, her aunt by marriage as a mortal. Drawn the Rina's reputation and clear abilities, she was embraced for her political ruthlessness and the influence she possessed. Tied to her sister, Beatrice, she was placed on Path of Power and the Inner Voice, like her, unlike their brother, Rafael, who was placed on Path of Night. A force of influence in Renaissance politics, she took to quietly manipulating members of her family from the shadows, hiding from the cloisters of the church and guiding politics on behalf of her sire and family. For centures, the politics of Italy were her playground, a key figure in amongst the Lasombra of Italy, far away from the madness and wars of the Sabbat of the New World. safe there, Rina turned to other pursuits, her mortal interest in alchemy combing with her newfound talent with Obtenebration,  That all changed when her distant kindsman, Giangaleazzo, betrayed them all. Defecting to the Camarilla, he burned the Code of Milan in front of all of their faces, causing the shift of centuries of power in the country. Realizing the shift, her sire called his brood remainin in Italy to come to the New World. Let the Camarilla try to route them, they will go elsewhere and create a new domain. Reunited with Beatrice, they have created a new pack in a new city, The influence she has enjoyed for centuries is gone, but that perhaps is not a bad thing. She can find a new challenge in Los Angeles, to take the area by storm as she once had Italy, and to aid her pack in proving their dominance. With her, she is bringing her
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

records.column_2: Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

rows: Using Influence, Elite to gain control over and turn Van Nuys Airport into an International hub.

Mystical Research: Your research uncovers places of power in Malibu, Hollywood, and, Griffith Park. Your ability to discover such places further East were hamprered by the Camarilla and the NPM. You suspect Pasadena has a place of power as well but you could not confirm it's location. Van Nuys Airport: Although you have yet to discover who else is operating in the airport the operations official you've been grooming is ready to be utilized (You can buy Elite Influence with VN Airport as a specialty)
Using Influence, Elite to gain control over and turn Van Nuys Airport into an International hub. Show Paladin Geza around LA

You met with Paladin Geza in Hollywod and defended the Cathedral with your influence.  Your patrol near San Pedro revealed the presence of two well dressed vampires you believed to be Camarilla, you were unable to impede them but you might be able to discover what they were up to if you wanted to follow...

While feeding in you encounter a mortal running a food bank.  At first you planned to feed on him but you were intrigued by his kindness with how kind he was with the young women who sought out his help.  When you felt a echo of longing you decided to feed on him in hopes of riding yourself of these false emotions, but as you approached him you felt the fire of true faith burning within him.  You remembered the address of the food back but found blood elsewhere that night.

While investigating the influences of the Camarilla vampire (Nathaniel Johnson) you discover he has an incredible array of power over every aspect of mortal life in LA, but find it difficult to pin down the exact pawns he's using to control everything from the police to the port authority.  For a lone vampire he controls the influence of two or three.  You can't be sure because of all of his precautions but you suspect that some of his influence is being used to undermine South Bay, perhaps in preparation for an imminent Camarilla attack.
